title: Sun Pharma — CPHI India 2024
description: Approach Media designed and fabricated a 72 SQM double-decker exhibition stall for Sun Pharma at CPHI India 2024. Ground floor (48 sqm) comprises a product display zone, LED video wall, and open meeting area. Mezzanine (24 sqm) houses a VIP meeting room with glass enclosure and branded reception. Structural frame: aluminium extrusion with RCC mezzanine slab. Materials: fabric graphics, powder-coated steel, tempered glass, vinyl flooring.
design_brief: Design a 72 SQM double decker stall for Sun Pharma at CPHI India 2024 with a VIP mezzanine, LED display wall, and structured product zones for their API and formulation portfolio.
ai_summary: The 72 SQM double-decker stall gave Sun Pharma a dominant presence at CPHI 2024. The LED wall drew footfall while the mezzanine VIP room enabled private business conversations.
materials_used: Aluminium Extrusion | RCC Mezzanine Slab | Tempered Glass | Fabric Graphics | Vinyl Flooring
special_features: LED Video Wall | VIP Mezzanine Room | Glass Enclosure
